S.FORM: == James Blackwell == James Blackwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 2, James Blackwell, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== James Blackwell == James Blackwell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 2, James Blackwell, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *ames~ɕ βlaʦ~ʨkwell == *ames~ɕ βlaʦ~ʨkwell s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *ames~ɕ βlaʦ~ʨkwell, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
